| The White House • October 2, 2019
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: ‘Whistleblower’ colluded with House Democrats before making complaint **

**As President Donald J. Trump** joined Finland President Sauli Niinistö for a joint press conference this afternoon, he was handed a breaking news article published by _The New York Times_. The story is damning for House Democrats: Impeachment czar and Intelligence Committee Chairman Adam Schiff (D-CA) knew about the “whistleblower’s” complaint against President Trump _before_ he or she made it.

**President Trump** : [Schiff’s account to Congress was a total fabrication.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8629aaf3da&e=3ee4985eea)

**“The federal intelligence** community whistleblower law explicitly states intelligence community whistleblowers must formally go through the ICIG [Inspector General of the Intelligence Community] *before* contacting Congress,” _Federalist_ cofounder Sean Davis writes on Twitter.

**Rep. Devin Nunes** (R-CA) adds that Rep. Schiff “withheld this info from the American people” and even from the House Intelligence Committee. “In light of this news, it’s hard to view impeachment as anything aside from an orchestrated farce.”

**Legitimate whistleblowers** do this country an important service, President Trump says. But when these laws are exploited for raw partisan politics, it makes a mockery of the entire process. The damage being done to public trust in government is enormous.

[“Trump's transparency is driving the left nuts,” says former Rep. Jason Chaffetz.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e40c808811&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump’s advice: Read the transcript!**

**Last week,** House Democrats chose to open an impeachment inquiry into Trump before they even investigated the alleged “quid pro quo” and “cover-up” in his phone call with Ukranian President Volodymyr Zelensky. That decision will haunt Democrats for months if not years to come.

**The very next day** , President Trump foiled their gambit by releasing the full, unredacted transcript of his telephone conversation. [You can read it here.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=708f23a0c8&e=3ee4985eea)

**The President** wants all Americans to read the transcript for themselves. Congressional Democrats do not. That alone reveals their stunning error in judgment. The far left may not care what the truth is, but most American citizens expect Congress to do its homework before trying to remove a duly elected President from office. It didn’t.

**It explains why** Rep. Adam Schiff read a fake, “parody” transcript of the call before the House Intelligence Committee last week. It explains why Democrats have quickly moved on to demanding other transcripts and documents, hoping to distract from the fact that the entire basis of their impeachment inquiry was proven to be false in a matter of hours.

**The problem is that,** once again, Speaker Nancy Pelosi has overpromised and underdelivered. Democrats do not have the votes to remove President Trump from office. Even if they did, a majority of Americans oppose impeachment. Democrat leaders know this. But since they’ve used investigations as an excuse to obstruct bipartisan legislation for nearly 3 years, they eventually had to deliver something for their far-left base.

**It won’t work** , but the good news is that something positive will come from the Democrats’ astonishing political incompetence. Democrats _are_ right that Americans deserve to know the truth about corruption on the part of elected officials. With the media spotlight now on the Ukraine investigation, they’re finally going to get it.

**Senate Democrats pressured Ukraine** last year to [cooperate on the Mueller investigation](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab85c7f7d6&e=3ee4985eea) into President Trump. This year, President Trump has asked Ukraine to fully cooperate with the Justice Department’s investigation into the actions of former Vice President Joe Biden and his family in Ukraine.

**Transparency and accountability** apply to everyone**.** Congressional Democrats got their 2-year investigation into President Trump, which turned up nothing. Now, aided by their own impeachment stunt, Democrat leaders are coming under the same scrutiny.

**That’s a good thing.** After all, Speaker Pelosi put it best: If there’s nothing to hide, then they have nothing to worry about.
---
|
---
|

name: Tim Walz
subject: Co-sign my letter to the Minnesota Legislature
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Twenty years ago, a vile of insulin cost between $16 and $20. Today, it costs between $300 and $400. Minnesotans are scrambling to afford the doses they need to survive, and while I'm encouraged the House and Senate have both put forward proposals, we can't afford to wait any longer. It's time for Legislative leaders to come to the table, work out differences, and send a bill to my desk that holds pharmaceutical companies accountable and prevents more needless deaths. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/dx5jaYBGlXZPt02AMI1LfaQh2YGHXyx3_IFYgriDgfs=/V9XEPws_nA-XJMq6BwTnUY4fOItQvU1gmgZy05Gw7Tc=)

My friend,
Twenty years ago, a vile of insulin cost between $16 and $20. Today, it costs between $300 and $400.
Minnesotans are scrambling to afford the doses they need to survive, and while I'm encouraged the House and Senate have both put forward proposals, we can't afford to wait any longer.
**It 's time for Legislative leaders to come to the table, work out differences, and send a bill to my desk that holds pharmaceutical companies accountable and prevents more needless deaths.**
[**Will you co-sign my letter to the Minnesota Legislature urging them to take immediate action to address insulin prices?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dx5jaYBGlXZPt02AMI1LfaQh2YGHXyx3_IFYgriDgfs=/V9XEPws_nA-XJMq6BwTnUY4fOItQvU1gmgZy05Gw7Tc=)

No one should be forced to go without lifesaving drugs, especially not one as common and essential as insulin.
**I 'm ready to call a special session and sign a bill the moment it hits my desk. Help us keep the pressure on so we can get this done. Co-sign my letter to the Minnesota Legislature today.**
**[SIGN NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/dx5jaYBGlXZPt02AMI1LfaQh2YGHXyx3_IFYgriDgfs=/V9XEPws_nA-XJMq6BwTnUY4fOItQvU1gmgZy05Gw7Tc=)**
Thank you,
Tim Walz

name: Mike Franken
subject: [Impeachment] Will Joni Ernst ignore this, too?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
When you see something wrong, you have to speak up. But, with all the new allegations of the president asking foreign governments to assist him with his re-election campaign being released nearly dail
|
---

| | Friends -- When something is terribly wrong, you have to speak up...especially as an elected member of Congress. But, with all the new allegations of the president asking foreign governments to assist with his re-election campaign, a daily deluge, Senator Ernst is nowhere to be heard. Silent. _So does silence mean acquiescence? _ Commenting on Trump's call with the Ukrainian president, Joni Ernst says she doesn't, "...see anything there." _Really?!_ [**We need to get her attention. Add your name here, and let 's ask Joni Ernst what it'll take to support an impeachment inquiry. **](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2470/33365068/4a65740a/3f8bb4fa/3726118084/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry-email?source=20191003_a_em") [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2470/33365068/4a65740a/3f8bb4fb/3726118084/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry-email?source=20191003_a_em_img") | [**Add your name**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2470/33365068/4a65740a/3f8bb4f4/3726118084/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry-email?source=20191003_a_em_btn")
---
I have no idea what excuse she'll come up with to dismiss the latest news that the president ALSO requested the Australian prime minister to help his attorney general dig up dirt on the Mueller investigation.
We need to stand together, to make sure these VERY SERIOUS allegations are fully and impartially investigated, and fight to get this country back onto a path that respects the rule of law and the norms of good governance.
But we can't do that when partisans like Joni Ernst are willing to look the other way. [**Add your name today, and join me in calling on her to support a full inquiry into these allegations. **](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2470/33365068/4a65740a/3f8bb4f5/3726118084/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry-email?source=20191003_a_em")
[**Add your name**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2470/33365068/4a65740a/3f8bb4f4/3726118084/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry-email?source=20191003_a_em_btn")

Very respectfully,
Mike

name: Jason Yates
subject: Freedom Wins in Court Ruling
body:
| | Believing God isn’t just an opinion—it has long been a right for everyone in our country.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvP5vSIFyE7BjWXsTsYvjcmZGSNvh3jYWX4pyP6kLortyhxdbv7ElVT98ovE05GzQu8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191003com01&n=1)
| Peter, It’s not every day we have encouraging and important updates for you on issues of religious freedom, but today we have a _significant_ court victory we want to make you aware of. One of our My Faith Votes Contributors in Arizona, Jan K. Potter, has broken down for us the Arizona Supreme Court’s recent ruling. _“On September 17, 2019, front page headlines in the Arizona Republic read: “LGBTQ decision goes against city.” The complaint concerned the AZ Supreme Court’s ruling that the business Brush and Nib Studio cannot be forced to create custom wedding invitations to same-sex couples._ _“Whose city are we talking about? I live in this city and I and many other people agree with the court's decision. It’s not with venom or prejudice that Brush and Nib choose not to create custom same-sex wedding invitations but simply because they could not, in good conscience, violate their beliefs. If they refused to ignore their conscience, they would have to lose their business or each owner could be penalized up to $2500 per day and six months in jail!_ _“So what do the owners of Brush & Nib Studio base their concerns on?_” Take a few minutes to read the **[rest of the article](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvP5vSIFyE7BjWXsTsYvjcmZGSNvh3jYWX4pyP6kLortyhxdbv7ElVT98ovE05GzQu8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191003com01&n=2)**. We praise God for this victory for religious freedom, and we also acknowledge the ideological battle that threatens religious freedom if we do not stand in its defense. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvP5vSIFyE7BjWXsTsYvjcmZGSNvh3jYWX4pyP6kLortyhxdbv7ElVT98ovE05GzQu8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191003com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191003com01&n=4)

subject: This won't be easy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you're ready to tax excessive lobbying in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We need to fight back, so I've released the most sweeping set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate. Under my plan, we will end lobbying as we know it. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285284e2/45c30650/1085d9b63/668e1296/2011546748/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Corporate interests spend more on lobbying than we spend to fund both houses of Congress -- $2.8 billion last year alone.

But corporate lobbyists also swarm our federal agencies, like the Environmental Protection Agency and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

**Corporate lobbyists are experts at killing widely popular policies behind closed doors.** They've defended predatory financial advisors against new rules, made sure fossil fuel companies can continue emitting greenhouse gases, and helped payday lenders whisper into the ears of the Trump administration and cripple consumer protection rules. They'll do whatever it takes to maximize their profits -- even if it comes at the expense of working people.

**We need to fight back, so I've released the most sweeping set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate. Under my plan, we will end lobbying as we know it.

My plan also calls for something unique -- a new tax on excessive lobbying on every corporation and trade organization that spends over $500,000 per year on lobbying. Every dollar raised by the tax will be placed into a new Lobbying Defense Trust Fund dedicated to helping Congress and federal agencies fight back.**

**[Read on to learn more, and sign your name if you're ready to fight back too.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285284e2/45c30650/1085d9b63/668e1298/2011546748/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUswM1BfUkxUX0NPUl9FXzIwMTkxMDAzX1YxUzFfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-taxing-excessive-lobbying?source=EMK03P_RLT_COR_E_20191003_V1S1_P_T1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Companies that spend between $500,000 and $1 million per year on lobbying will pay a 35% tax on those expenditures. For every dollar above $1 million, the rate will increase to 60% -- and for every dollar above $5 million, it will increase to 75%.

Some of the companies that would have to pay the tax? Koch Industries, Pfizer, Boeing, Microsoft, Walmart, and Exxon.

And nobody will be surprised that the top five industries that would have paid the highest lobbying taxes over the last ten years are: Big Pharma, health insurance companies, oil and gas companies, Wall Street firms, and electric utilities.

**With the revenue from this new tax, we will establish a new Lobbying Defense Trust Fund, which will help our government fight back against the influence of lobbyists.**

First, we'll use the Lobbying Defense Trust Fund to strengthen congressional support agencies. This lobbying tax revenue would help to reinstate the Office of Technology Assessment and increase the budget for agencies like the Congressional Budget Office.

Second, we'll give more money to federal agencies that are facing significant lobbying activity. Every time a company spends more than $500,000 lobbying against a rule, the taxes on that spending will go directly to the agency.

Third, revenue from the lobbying tax will help to establish a new Office of the Public Advocate. This office will help the American people engage with federal agencies and fight for the public interest in the rule-making process.

**My new lobbying tax will make hiring armies of lobbyists significantly more expensive for the largest corporate influencers like Blue Cross Blue Shield, Boeing, and Comcast.

It's just one more example of the kind of big, structural change we need to put power back in the hands of the people -- and break the grip that lobbyists have on our government for good.**

**[Add your name today if you're in this fight against excessive lobbying in Washington.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285284e2/45c30650/1085d9b63/668e1298/2011546748/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUswM1BfUkxUX0NPUl9FXzIwMTkxMDAzX1YxUzFfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-taxing-excessive-lobbying?source=EMK03P_RLT_COR_E_20191003_V1S1_P_T1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| Friends,

We're facing an all-out assault on women's reproductive freedoms in our country. This year alone, eight states have passed incredibly restrictive anti-abortion laws, with more on the way.

Make no mistake: The end goal here is to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , outlaw abortion, and deny women in America their basic human rights.

**We MUST elect strong, fearless women to Congress who will never compromise when it comes to our reproductive freedoms. That 's why I'm beyond proud to announce Off the Sidelines' first 2020 endorsement: My friend, Marie Newman.**

Marie is running in Illinois against Rep. Dan Lipinski--a staunchly anti-choice Democrat who voted to defund Planned Parenthood and for a nationwide abortion ban.

[**Marie can win this race, but she needs our help to do it. So I 've set a big goal: Raise $10,000 by midnight tonight. Please, split a donation between Marie's campaign and Off the Sidelines today!**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIyMDUwMzQS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDE4NzE3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Let me tell you a bit more about Marie:

She was born and raised in her Illinois district outside of Chicago. She was among the first in her family to go to college, founded a program to tackle bullying and became an advocate for children, health care, income inequality, and LGBTQ rights.

Marie's primary opponent opposed Obamacare's insurance coverage of birth control. He speaks at an annual anti-choice gathering and attends fundraisers for an extreme anti-choice organization.

**Marie ran against him last year and came within just 2,000 votes of defeating him. In this solidly blue district, whoever wins the primary is all-but guaranteed general election victory.** We have to help her close the gap this year because Illinoisans deserve leaders who will truly fight for all of them, including women seeking reproductive health care.

Let me tell you a bit more about Marie: She was born and raised in her Illinois district outside of Chicago. She was among the first in her family to go to college, founded a program to tackle bullying and became an advocate for children, health care, income inequality, and LGBTQ rights. Marie's primary opponent opposed Obamacare's insurance coverage of birth control. He speaks at an annual anti-choice gathering and attends fundraisers for an extreme anti-choice organization. Marie ran against him last year and came within just 2,000 votes of defeating him. In this solidly blue district, whoever wins the primary is all-but guaranteed general election victory. We have to help her close the gap this year because Illinoisans deserve leaders who will truly fight for all of them, including women seeking reproductive health care. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Schiff Got Early Account of Accusations as Whistle-Blower’s Concerns Grew
body:
The New York Times reports that Democrat Rep. Adam Schiff, head of the House Intelligence Committee, knew about the “whistle-blower” complaint... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76b596c6f3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Schiff Got Early Account of Accusations as Whistle-Blower’s Concerns Grew**

_The New York Times_ reports that Democrat Rep. Adam Schiff, head of the House Intelligence Committee, knew about the “whistle-blower” complaint against President Trump _before_ it was ever filed.

“The early account by the future whistle-blower shows how determined he was to make known his allegations,” Julian E. Barnes, Michael S. Schmidt, and Matthew Rosenberg write. Schiff’s team steered the whistleblower to file a complaint even though “the original accusation was vague.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=661178e578&e=3ee4985eea)

**_Washington Examiner_****:** [“Adam Schiff needs to go.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a9810f23f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The impeachment process is barely underway and already some constitutional norms are being trampled without a note of media notice or political concern. To wit, can a whistleblower inside the intelligence bureaucracy override a President’s right to executive privilege merely with an accusation?” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a68a251b11&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Now any bureaucrat who hears about a conversation can file a complaint that overrides a President’s ability to speak with foreign leaders with the expectation of privacy. We are in dangerous constitutional waters.”
---
|
---
| Today, First Lady Melania Trump travels to Wyoming to promote national parks and spread the child well-being message that's a key component of her “Be Best” initiative, [Local News 8](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6837240ad7&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “The White House says Thursday's visit will be about encouraging fourth-graders to get a pass from the National Park Service so they can spend more time outdoors.”
---
|
---
| “U.S. President Donald Trump will unveil an executive order on Thursday aimed at strengthening the Medicare health program for seniors, seeking to improve its fiscal position and offer more affordable plan options,” Jeff Mason reports for [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0235599e0c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Google is committing to a White House initiative designed to get private companies to expand job training for American workers,” Darlene Superville writes for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5055710eef&e=3ee4985eea). “CEO Sundar Pichai was making the announcement Thursday during an appearance with White House senior adviser Ivanka Trump at El Centro community college in downtown Dallas.”
---
|
---
| “Should Congress pass bipartisan legislation that creates over 176,000 new jobs in America, or should Congress drag a duly-elected president into impeachment proceedings on the basis of false rumors?” Rep. Steve Scalise (R-LA) writes in [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7965cc036c&e=3ee4985eea). “For most Americans, that’s a no-brainer. Congress should focus on making Americans’ lives better, not partisan showboating that threatens to tear our country apart.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12db0ff1d5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75dbd16441&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c35cb72d88)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c77/4bef7a87/6b73027f/287f25ea/1612303410/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Big news -
My team is still doing the math on our fundraising numbers from last quarter. (It's taking a while because so many people stepped up!)
**But as of right now, it looks like we hit our fundraising goal!**
I'll report back when we have a final number, but for right now, I just wanted to say _thank you._
I mean it when we say, we couldn't have made it this far without you. I'm not taking any money from corporate PACs, so we are dependent on your grassroots donations. Without them, my campaign cannot move forward.
And don't worry, we're putting your dollars straight to work! Early this quarter, we're focusing on hiring more campaign staff and setting up the infrastructure we'll need to defeat Susan Collins next year.
We're only able to do that because of you, so thank you for making our work possible. I want every single person who made a donation, or signed a petition, or shared a Facebook post about our campaign to know - I'm so glad you're on our team.
Talk soon,
_Sara_

When you step up and donate, you provide us with the necessary resources to combat the corporations that fuel my opponent’s campaign. Thank you for the part you played in getting us this far. I’m looking forward to continuing to earn your support in the months ahead. With gratitude, Elisa Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

name: Team Yang
subject: Help us determine our strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
As an integral part of this campaign -- we want to hear from you.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1295%2E377263%2EapE5-h) Hey Yang Gang --

With your help we’ve made it this far. We crushed our Q3 goal and we’re starting our 4th quarter out strong -- the Yang Gang is growing exponentially.

Because this campaign is built on grassroots support with a Humanity First message -- it’s important that your voice is at the center of this campaign.

We want to hear from you about our October strategy. Specifically, how should we invest our time and money?

[**Can you fill out this quick strategy survey to let Team Yang know what investments we should make this month?**](https://act.yang2020.com/survey/email-20191003-strategysurvey/?source=email-20191003am&t=2&akid=1295%2E377263%2EapE5-h)

Andrew has been traveling across the country and hearing from more supporters like you. But we want to make sure that we hear from EVERYONE. That’s why we are asking you to share your thoughts. | [Take the Survey](https://act.yang2020.com/survey/email-20191003-strategysurvey/?source=email-20191003am&t=3&akid=1295%2E377263%2EapE5-h)
---
Thanks for everything you do!
-Team Yang
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12715?t=19&akid=1295%2E377263%2EapE5-h)

subject: POLL: Are you pro-choice?

body:

| | Hello Peter, Missouri, Georgia, Virginia, Tennessee \-- just a handful of the states that have led the charge on attacking safe and affordable reproductive healthcare. Trump made it very clear early on in his 2016 campaign that he was going to lead a very anti-choice administration, ushering in a 3-year onslaught of state laws limiting access to abortion, cutting funds to Planned Parenthood, and elevating medically inaccurate and dangerous anti-choice opinions. Trump even gave two anti-choice men lifetime seats on the Supreme Court so they can uphold these laws \-- and they may soon decide the fate of _Roe v. Wade_ and abortion as a whole. Despite this onslaught, public opinion has remained steady in support of abortion \-- according to a recent study, 54 percent support it being legal in most or all cases, holding nearly the same since 2014. Beyond abortion, 77 percent believe Medicaid and other government programs should cover birth control, despite the Trump administration's continuous efforts to defund these programs. This same study found that support for abortion amongst Democrats has only grown since 2014, rising from 67 percent to 70 percent. We're interested in seeing what you think: **Are you pro-choice?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc0/6e9863e8/1524bda8/1db0e822/4159672842/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dSV9gbf0") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc0/6e9863e8/1524bda8/1db0e822/4159672842/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dSV9gbf0") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddc0/6e9863e8/1524bda8/1db0e821/4159672842/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20191003a.ND&refcode2=G648KPQuGqp8mzGU5f4C")

| | Peter, Andy just got done with his first debate with Matt Bevin. To say he won is a huge understatement.

Andy showed why Matt Bevin has been an economic disaster for the rural areas of the state. And he made clear that he will bring back decency and respect to Frankfort.

**[With all the attention around the debate, we're asking you to chip in now to show the energy behind the Beshear/Coleman ticket.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a24/ad6dc73/1400cdfb/db7a30c/2598218532/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-postdebate?refcode=20191003.2nd__319__&amount=5")**

Matt Bevin likes to say that this election is about choosing a CEO of Kentucky. And Andy made the stakes clear:
* Do you want a CEO who abuses company resources and refuses to come clean like Matt Bevin does with the state plane?
* Do you want a CEO who bullies his employees like Matt Bevin does with his near constant attacks on teachers?
* Do you want a CEO who takes advantage of his position to get himself a half-price mansion?
* Do you want a CEO who refuses to disclose how much he is making and where the money is coming from like Matt Bevin does by refusing to release his taxes?

subject: No more Kavanaughs

body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ccc5/6cd27893/52748b53/15874478/887768006/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | The Constitution is _very_ clear. It's the US Senate's job to provide advice and consent on the President's nominees to the Supreme Court. One year ago, Brett Kavanaugh was being considered for the Supreme Court. And the Trump White House engaged in a cover-up to ensure that the Senate never got the full picture of the very credible allegations of sexual assault against Kavanaugh. The Trump White House prevented the FBI from investigating the many credible allegations of sexual assault by Kavanaugh and interviewing corroborating witnesses. **They conspired to do so with Mitch McConnell and his Republicans in the Senate.** And they also actively concealed documents from Kavanaugh's time in the Bush White House, breaking with precedent and refusing to turn over thousands of pages to the Senate. Let me be clear: Brett Kavanaugh has no business on the court. The lesson is as clear as day: **we _must_ take the Senate in 2020 and ensure this never happens again.** [**Donate $3 today. Stand with me in the run-up to 2020.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ccc5/6cd27893/52748b53/15874479/887768006/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-10-04-kavanaugh&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") It's all too clear why **Donald Trump wants to put Oregon on his victory map.** I'm not afraid to challenge efforts to undermine our nation's checks and balances, to call out the Trump administration's _many_ abuses, and how Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are enabling them. It's why I filed a lawsuit to try to block Kavanaugh's confirmation process and force the administration to turn over the documents they were concealing. And it's why I stood on the floor of the US Senate and read dozens of letters from women who wanted to share their own stories of sexual assault with my fellow Senators. **They want to defeat me, all right.** But I bet our grassroots team has something to say about that. subject: President Trump is protecting Medicare for America’s seniors
body:
Today, President Donald J. Trump traveled to The Villages, Florida, outlining how he will protect Medicare for our nation's seniors. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ccc0d90b9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 3, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump is protecting Medicare for America’s seniors**

**Today, President Donald J. Trump** traveled to The Villages, Florida, outlining how he will protect Medicare for our Nation's seniors. In doing so, he offered a clear contrast to Congressional Democrats’ socialist takeover vision for the public.

**A message to America’s seniors:** [“No one will lay a hand on your Medicare benefits.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c3daf5c06&e=3ee4985eea)

**“I made you** a sacred pledge that I would strengthen, protect, and defend Medicare for our senior citizens,” President Trump said. “Today, I will sign a historic executive order that does exactly that: We are making your Medicare even better—and we are not letting anyone take it away.”

**The newly signed** Executive Order will improve service to American seniors in many ways. First, it will empower patients by giving them more plan choices, more access to new therapies, and more time with providers. It will also maximize freedom for patients and providers by reducing regulatory burdens and eliminating unnecessary barriers.

**But most important** , it will improve the fiscal sustainability of Medicare overall, ensuring that it will always be there for those who need it most.

**In the Sunshine State alone** , more than 4.5 million people are currently enrolled in Medicare. Today’s announcement was just the latest bit of welcome news for Floridians as part of the President’s economic agenda for working Americans. More than 550,000 jobs have been added there since the election, and the state’s unemployment rate has been reduced from 4.7 percent to 3.3 percent.

**“Medicare is under threat** like never before. Almost every major Democrat in Washington has backed a massive government healthcare takeover that would obliterate Medicare.”

**The left’s “Medicare-for-All”** vision is a dangerous proposal, to put it lightly, threatening to end the Medicare program as we know it and eliminate choice for America’s seniors. If it is ever implemented, the end result would be Medicare-for-_none_.

[Democrats lied about Obamacare then. They’re lying about Medicare-for-All now.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=767e674068&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump’s healthcare vision:** [Puts America’s seniors and patients first](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=524edb213d&e=3ee4985eea)

A message to America’s seniors: “I made you a sacred pledge that I would strengthen, protect, and defend Medicare for our senior citizens,” President Trump said. “Today, I will sign a historic executive order that does exactly that: We are making your Medicare even better—and we are not letting anyone take it away.” The newly signed Executive Order will improve service to American seniors in many ways. First, it will empower patients by giving them more plan choices, more access to new therapies, and more time with providers. It will also maximize freedom for patients and providers by reducing regulatory burdens and eliminating unnecessary barriers. But most important , it will improve the fiscal sustainability of Medicare overall, ensuring that it will always be there for those who need it most. In the Sunshine State alone , more than 4.5 million people are currently enrolled in Medicare. Today’s announcement was just the latest bit of welcome news for Floridians as part of the President’s economic agenda for working Americans. More than 550,000 jobs have been added there since the election, and the state’s unemployment rate has been reduced from 4.7 percent to 3.3 percent. “Medicare is under threat like never before. Almost every major Democrat in Washington has backed a massive government healthcare takeover that would obliterate Medicare.” The left’s “Medicare-for-All” vision is a dangerous proposal, to put it lightly, threatening to end the Medicare program as we know it and eliminate choice for America’s seniors. If it is ever implemented, the end result would be Medicare-for-none. Back in February, Elizabeth announced her plan to break up Big Tech and limit the undue influence that tech companies have on our democracy and spread of information.

And as we've seen in the past couple of days, Mark Zuckerberg is not happy -- and he's promising to "go to the mat" and fight to maintain Facebook's monopoly if she's elected.

**It's clear: Silicon Valley billionaires are willing to sell out our democracy to protect their riches.**

Under a Warren Administration, tech companies like Facebook won't have the power to undermine our democracy. Elizabeth will enforce antitrust rules that have been on the books for decades, promote healthy competition so that tech companies are accountable to consumers, and make sure that no tech company has the ability to exploit our private information for profit.

[**Elizabeth is committed to protecting our democracy from Silicon Valley overreach -- but she needs your help to do it. Can you chip in for the first time today to help break up Big Tech?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852840c/45c30650/1082bc93f/668e0c7f/4202489866/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzA2Rl9FR1JfQlNDX1RfMjAxOTEwMDNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK06F_EGR_BSC_T_20191003_V1S1_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
More and more of the things we do online are controlled by a smaller and smaller clique of bigger and bigger tech corporations, who buy up their competitors or force them out of business using predatory tactics -- meaning less competition, less innovation, and a less democratic Internet for everyone.

But with Elizabeth's plan to break up Big Tech, instead of just a few giant tech companies calling all the shots, we can have more of a say in the tools we use every day.

That's how we get innovation. That's how we get an internet that connects all of us. That's how we protect our privacy and our democracy in a rapidly changing world.

America has a long history of breaking up monopolies that have too much power in the marketplace -- Standard Oil, AT&T, and the railroad industry led to the bipartisan creation of our first antitrust laws.

**We can do it again. We can break up monopolies like Facebook and Amazon and promote healthy competition in the tech market that respects our democracy and our privacy. But it's going to take all of us to join the fight, and Elizabeth needs your help.**

[**Can you chip in $3 or anything you can today to continue to fight for our democracy?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852840c/45c30650/1082bc93f/668e0c7f/4202489866/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzA2Rl9FR1JfQlNDX1RfMjAxOTEwMDNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK06F_EGR_BSC_T_20191003_V1S1_P")

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren

| Friend,

Right now, Cory Gardner is on his way to a three-day fundraising retreat for President Trump's re-election campaign.

Here's how these things typically go: Wealthy special interests pony up thousands of dollars for the opportunity to rub shoulders with our elected officials. They have dinner, take a few pictures, and then spend the night scheming about the best way to lower the corporate tax rate or roll back an environmental regulation or two.

Cory Gardner is used to this by now--he's been in Washington playing these kinds of games _for years_ , which has helped pump nearly $5 million into his war chest.

Our campaign is different. I'm not taking a single penny of corporate PAC money because this campaign is for the people of Colorado--and nobody else. That's a promise I made on day one.

Friend, the maximum contribution an individual can make to the Trump campaign is $5,600. PACs can give up to $10,000. You can bet that Gardner is going to rake in plenty of checks like that this weekend.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Tell Trump: Stop taking money from military schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Trump's border wall is wildly unpopular, and he could not convince Congress to fund it, even after forcing a record-long government shutdown in January. He has thrown tantrums, tweeted up storms, rallied his base, and used racial scare tactics in an attempt to buoy support for the wall. Now, he's resorted to declaring a national emergency and diverting desperately needed, congressionally appropriated defense dollars from Pentagon projects to build his wall. These $3.6 billion in funds were supposed to go toward upgrading military bases across the globe, including upgrading schools on military bases, housing facilities for military families, and upgrades at our service academies. Also included in the projects impacted were a ship repair facility, a cyber operations facility, and hazardous waste clean-up operations. This latest move by Trump hurts our military's ability to stay prepared and ready for any conflict while also going back on promises made to members of our armed forces to protect them and their families. [**Join us in telling Trump that he needs to stop playing games with military families and Americans over his wall. He is being irresponsible with our tax money and harming those who are serving this nation. clean_body: | | | Peter, Trump's border wall is wildly unpopular, and he could not convince Congress to fund it, even after forcing a record-long government shutdown in January. He has thrown tantrums, tweeted up storms, rallied his base, and used racial scare tactics in an attempt to buoy support for the wall. Now, he's resorted to declaring a national emergency and diverting desperately needed, congressionally appropriated defense dollars from Pentagon projects to build his wall. These $3.6 billion in funds were supposed to go toward upgrading military bases across the globe, including upgrading schools on military bases, housing facilities for military families, and upgrades at our service academies. Also included in the projects impacted were a ship repair facility, a cyber operations facility, and hazardous waste clean-up operations. This latest move by Trump hurts our military's ability to stay prepared and ready for any conflict while also going back on promises made to members of our armed forces to protect them and their families. subject: what we stand for
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
|
---
| | Hi there,

Growing up in Nambe, one of the first lessons I learned was about the power of community.

When I was a teenager, my grandparents were involved in a serious car crash. Immediately, my mother and her five siblings rearranged their schedules to rotate into my grandparents' Jacona home for a week at a time. If my grandparents needed anything, a community was there to help.

Right now, watching the headlines in Washington makes me think about those lessons and the power of community. Our country is facing big challenges -- from a president who ignores the rule of law to an economy that leaves too many of us behind. **But New Mexicans are used to facing tough odds and persevering together.**

My campaign is founded on the idea that when New Mexicans come together with pride for our diverse communities, we are unstoppable. Together, we can fight for health care, education, and our families and create a Washington that works for us.

**Today, we 're releasing a new video about the values I'm running on -- and I hope you'll take a moment to watch and share it with everyone you know by sending this email to three friends (or more!) and sharing it on social media.** [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b483/18e32a7f/53743dd5/7b07a773/934018830/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/videos/420995768548636/") | | ******[**Share on Twitter**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b483/18e32a7f/53743dd5/7b07a770/934018830/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=I%27m%20proud%20to%20support%20%40BenRayLujan%20because%20he%20knows%20that%20when%20New%20Mexicans%20come%20together%20with%20pride%20in%20ourselves%2C%20we%20are%20unstoppable.%20Take%20a%20look%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fbenraylujan%2Fstatus%2F1179879933570510848%3Fs%3D20")******
---

******[**Share on Facebook**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b483/18e32a7f/53743dd5/7b07a771/934018830/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBenRayLujan%2Fvideos%2F420995768548636%2F")******
---
_Make sure to tag the post with**#PeopleForBen** to join our community online!_
We have a grassroots army behind us because we're running on a vision to believe in. Next November, we're going to win this race and bring the voices of every New Mexican into the halls of the U.S. Senate.

**Ready? Let 's go.**

Ben Ray

| ******[**Contribute**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peopleforben?refcode=dd_20191003_em_video_natl&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b483/18e32a7f/53743dd5/7b07a76a/934018830/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b483/18e32a7f/53743dd5/7b07a76b/934018830/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b483/18e32a7f/53743dd5/7b07a768/934018830/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

Albuquerque, NM 87125
